repo.name: Bag
repo.description: Official F-Droid repository for Bag — Bitcoin Portfolio Monitor for Android.

apps.description:
Bag is a Bitcoin-only price tracker and net worth dashboard. Enter how much BTC
you hold and see your net worth in up to 3 selectable fiat currencies, with price
charts, a DCA tracker, and a home screen widget.

Bitcoin-focused, open source, and privacy-first. No ads, no analytics, no accounts.

Features:
* Net worth in up to 3 fiat currencies
* Historical price charts (1D / 1W / 1M / 1Y / ALL)
* DCA tracker with P&L
* Home screen widget
* Mempool fee estimates
* Dark and light theme

Pro (one-time purchase):
* Watch-only zpub wallet tracking (BIP84)
* Tor routing via Orbot
* Custom Esplora server
* Bitcoin Health Check (privacy scoring)
* Sentinel always-on monitoring
* Mempool fee alerts
apps.summary: Bitcoin portfolio monitor & net worth dashboard
